To-do list

An incomplete list with ideas / pending tasks / things I want to add or update in the site.

  • Migrate site to Eleventy
  • Add a real changelog that's not just a link to the GitHub commits list
  • Add a guestbook that works 🥲
  • Improve the contact page
  • Refactor the art page without JavaScript and with improved accessibility
  • Might as well refactor the meme collection page...
  • ...and the joined fanlistings page, while I'm at it
  • Add a /reading page with books I'm currently reading (scraping data from The StoryGraph?? or is there an API?)
  • Add a /games page listing the games I'm playing lately
  • Add a /uses page (see uses.tech)
  • Add a /skincare page to keep track of how I take care of my rosacea and etc.
  • Add cookie notice (again)
    • I don't actually use cookies, but I added a privacy policy, as I'm based in Europe and it's required
  • Create a new button to link to the site

Page created: 21/04/2025, last updated: 01/05/2026
